title: Rock Paper Scissors
description: A cyberpunk-styled Rock Paper Scissors game with animated hand-shake battle sequence, win/loss/tie visual states, input throttle during animation, and localStorage best-score persistence.
author: Girish Madarkar
features: AI randomizer: Math.random() × 3 lookup into ['rock','paper','scissors'] pool for unbiased CPU selection
Algebraic state matrix: 3-rule judge function — tie (===), win (rock>scissors|paper>rock|scissors>paper), loss (else)
Animated battle sequence: 600ms handShake (0.4s @keyframes × 2 cycles) with double fist icons before revealing outcome
Exploit-safe throttle: locked boolean gates all battle() calls, disabled attribute on all choice buttons during animation phase
Border glow states: win = emerald #00ff88 border, lose = crimson #ff2a5f border, tie = cyan #00f0ff border on arena slots
Scoreboard telemetry: player/cpu/ties tracked with color-coded values, best stored as max playerScore via localStorage rpsBest key
Reset utility: zeroes player, cpu, and tie counters, clears arena and result bar without page reload, saves best
